products.name: Velvet Evening Gown
products.description: Exquisite deep burgundy velvet evening gown with a plunging neckline and floor-length silhouette. Features hand-sewn beading along the bodice and a dramatic open back. Perfect for galas and upscale events.

products.name: Silk Midi Dress
products.description: Fluid ivory silk midi dress with a wrap silhouette and delicate floral print. The adjustable tie-waist creates a flattering fit for all body types. Ideal for cocktail parties and daytime elegance.

products.name: Structured Blazer Dress
products.description: Modern power-dressing at its finest. This structured blazer dress in charcoal grey features sharp lapels, a cinched waist belt, and a thigh-high hemline. A statement piece for the contemporary woman.

products.name: Lace Cocktail Dress
products.description: Romantic black lace cocktail dress with a sweetheart neckline and fitted silhouette. The intricate floral lace pattern overlays a satin lining, creating a timeless and sophisticated look.

products.name: Celestial Princess Gown
products.description: A breathtaking princess-cut wedding gown featuring a corseted bodice adorned with thousands of hand-placed crystals and pearls. The cathedral-length train cascades in layers of the finest French tulle, creating an ethereal silhouette for the modern fairytale bride.

products.name: Serene Mermaid Gown
products.description: An elegantly sculpted mermaid gown in ivory crepe that hugs every curve. The illusion back is adorned with delicate floral appliqués and covered buttons. A detachable silk train adds drama for the reception. For the bride who dares to be bold.

products.name: Bohemian Garden Dress
products.description: A free-spirited A-line wedding dress crafted from lightweight chiffon with delicate lace inserts. Features flutter sleeves, a V-neckline with floral embroidery, and a soft sweep train. Perfect for outdoor and destination weddings.

products.name: Timeless Ball Gown
products.description: The quintessential fairytale ball gown in blush champagne. Featuring a structured sweetheart bodice with 3D floral appliqués and a voluminous tulle skirt with a royal-length train. For the bride who dreams of a classic, unforgettable entrance.
